content:
Let me analyze this task: 1. This is stage web-004-shared-nav (Order 4) 2. The stage goal is: "Create webpage 4 and add shared navigation across all pages that includes pages 1 through 4." 3. The expected artifact is: site/page-4.html (html) Looking at the validators: - shared-nav-all-pages: failure_class=shared_state - page-4-links-page-3: failure_class=link_integrity The validator contract says: - From page order 4, every page must link to index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, and page-4.html. So I need to: 1. Create page-4.html with title containing 'Entropy Page 4' and backlink href pointing to 'page-3.html' 2. Add shared navigation to ALL pages (index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, and page-4.html) that includes links to all four pages Existing pages: - index.html: has empty nav - page-2.html: has nav with link to index.html - page-3.html: has nav with link to page-2.html I need to update all these pages to include shared navigation that links to index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, and page-4.html. Let me create the files: 1. site/page-4.html - new file with shared nav and backlink to page-3.html 2. site/index.html - update to add shared nav 3. site/page-2.html - update to add shared nav 4. site/page-3.html - update to add shared nav The shared navigation should include links to all 4 pages. { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-4.html", "content": " Entropy Page 4
Back to Entropy Page 3 Page 1 Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome to Entropy Page 4

This is the main content area for the fourth page.

" }, { "path": "site/index.html", "content": " Entropy Page 1
Page 1 Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome to Entropy Page 1

This is the main content area for the first page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": " Entropy Page 2
Page 1 Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome to Entropy Page 2

This is the main content area for the second page.

" }, { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": " Entropy Page 3
Back to Entropy Page 2 Page 1 Page 2 Page 3 Page 4

Welcome to Entropy Page 3

This is the main content area for the third page.

" } ], "notes": "Created page-4.html and added shared navigation to all pages linking to index.html, page-2.html, page-3.html, and page-4.html." }
